question: Based on the scatterplot of years versus wealth, what can you reliably conclude about which year has the highest wealth?

options.A: The year 25 clearly has the highest wealth.
options.B: The year 70 clearly has the highest wealth.
options.C: One specific year is clearly the highest, but it is difficult to distinguish which year from the chart.
options.D: It is impossible to see any differences in wealth between years on this chart.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 65 and 70 have the highest wealth. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of wealth in certain age ranges.
